title: Command per Player
description: lets you run a command on multiple players that you can select
body:
**Press J to open menu**

![how the mod looks looks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b0a9437488fc099e8a464f76bed26e8393e4776.png)

lets you run a command on multiple players that you can select. 
select players by clicking on their names, deselect by clicking again.
commands will show a preview before executing.
